name: g60_first_anchored_patch_instance_v0_1
purpose: First anchored G60 support patch instance built around the north face-center anchor.

carrier.why_chosen: North was selected as the first speaking face-center anchor.

local_chart.chart_orientation: chart read on the north face after eastern-sector perturbation
local_chart.chart_flip_description: swap left-like and right-like continuation classes relative to the north-face chart

incoming_incidence.note: First lawful arrival into north_face_center, sourced from the eastern sector of the north face.

candidate_continuations.note: First two admissible anchored continuations from north_face_center under east-sector perturbation.

framed_partition.partition_note: Initial North-relative partition after East perturbs the North face.

local_reversal_data.chart_flip_action: swap the two continuation classes under North-chart reversal
